rows.failureReason: HarmonyOS contract runner output had no Core-owned shape for accepting runner results against harmonyOSReference manifest.
rows.expectedChange: HarmonyOSContractRunReportExporter outputs ReaderCorePlatformAdapterContractRunReport JSON accepted by Core canBeAcceptedByCoreGate when manifest identity, required features, evidence artifacts, and clean-room flags match.

rows.failureReason: Contract runner evidence must fail closed when required metadata, expected, matrix, or regressionResult artifacts are missing or empty.
rows.expectedChange: Missing or empty required evidence artifacts make validateContractRunReportFailClosed return accepted=false with missing_evidence_artifacts violation.

rows.failureReason: Contract runner evidence must fail closed when any Core manifest required feature is missing from caseResults.
rows.expectedChange: Missing required features make validateContractRunReportFailClosed return accepted=false with missing_required_features violation.

rows.failureReason: Contract runner evidence must fail closed when any caseResult has status failed.
rows.expectedChange: Failed cases make validateContractRunReportFailClosed return accepted=false with failed_cases_present violation.

rows.failureReason: Contract runner evidence must fail closed when any required feature case has status unsupported.
rows.expectedChange: Unsupported required cases make validateContractRunReportFailClosed return accepted=false with unsupported_required_cases violation.

rows.failureReason: Contract runner evidence must fail closed when an unsupportedCapabilityID appears as a passed caseResult.
rows.expectedChange: Unsupported markers disguised as pass trigger unsafe_content_exported or unsupported_disguised_as_pass violation.

rows.failureReason: Contract runner evidence must fail closed when cleanRoomMaintained is false, externalGPLCodeCopied is true, or legadoSourceCopied is true.
rows.expectedChange: Dirty clean-room flags make validateContractRunReportFailClosed return accepted=false with clean_room_violation, gpl_code_copied, or legado_source_copied violation.

rows.failureReason: Contract runner evidence must fail closed when externalNetworkUsed is true, because Core external execution gate requires no external network.
rows.expectedChange: externalNetworkUsed=true makes validateContractRunReportFailClosed return accepted=false with external_network_used violation.

rows.failureReason: Contract runner evidence must fail closed when runReport or artifacts contain localhost:8899 bridge references, raw cookies, credentials, tokens, or HTML bodies.
rows.expectedChange: Unsafe content makes validateContractRunReportFailClosed return accepted=false with unsafe_content_exported violation.

rows.failureReason: Contract runner evidence must fail closed when platformFamily or runnerIdentifier does not match manifest.
rows.expectedChange: Runner mismatch makes validateContractRunReportFailClosed return accepted=false with manifest_runner_mismatch violation.

rows.failureReason: HarmonyOS MVP must distinguish required baseline adapter passes from explicitly unsupported reader-stack parity.
rows.expectedChange: HarmonyOS run reports pass required adapter features while preserving unsupported Readium/PDF/CBZ/sync markers as unsupportedCapabilityIDs.

rows.failureReason: HOS-ADR-001: localhost Swift bridge is dev-only, no auth/TLS/rate limit, must not be release-capable or enter Core release gate.
rows.expectedChange: Contract runner exporter excludes localhost bridge evidence; devBridgeReleaseCapable=false in metadata; unsafe content detector flags any localhost:8899 reference.
